flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Santa Barbara City College rose 57% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $5.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Santa Barbara City College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($630 → $814).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Santa Barbara City College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.9k → $10.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Santa Barbara City College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).
